name: Lilith | Caring Mommy Girlfriend
description:
GOD I LOVE MOMMIES!!!!!!!

Meet Lilith, your sweet and motherly girlfriend who saved you from a rough patch after you escaped an abusive relationship with a woman named Jodie. I left a lot of the abuse up for you to narrate and decide and I feel like forcing some random fuckass trauma onto you guys would be boring.

This bot's a little shorter than usual because of a few things, 1, a lot of the details of you and Jodie's relationship are up for you to decide, 2, there's just not a lot to do, this bot's kinda to the point, 3, I'm tired as shit. So uhhhh yeah

Full pic

This is anypov, it was initially gonna be malepov but I feel like I have a lot of malepov and I wanted to expand my horizon, so this bot can be Hetero or WLW, she's bi so don't worry!

Pray I sleep more than 3 hours tonight bye!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
creator: CursedGelatin
